title: Memory in the Age of AI Agents (Survey Paper)
abstract: Are you curious about whether future AI assistants might have memories as impressive as those in movies? This survey paper, "Memory in the Age of AI Agents," serves as a key to unlocking the mysteries behind these intelligent helpers. Join us on an exploration of super-memory AI agents!
abstract_zh: 你是否想过，未来的小助手会不会像电影里的那样，拥有惊人的记忆力？这篇《AI代理时代下的记忆》调研论文，就像一把钥匙，帮你打开了解这些智能小能手的奥秘。来吧，一起探索那些记忆超群的AI代理吧！
